title: Trading API Latency Degradation Runbook (Cached)
steps: Check market data feed latency — Bloomberg/Refinitiv connection health
Verify order routing layer and FIX gateway connection pool
Check database connection pool on trading-db-01 and trading-db-02
Review circuit breaker status on downstream broker connections
Escalate to markets SRE if latency > 500ms sustained for > 2 minutes
